raw_content:
{
  "news": [
    {
      "title": "美参议员呼吁CFTC调查Polymarket",
      "summary": "据报道，美国两党参议员致信CFTC，要求调查Polymarket在超级碗投注中出现虚假投注报告的事件。这可能导致对预测市场的更严格监管，短期利空Polymarket及相关概念币（如REP等），但长期可能推动合规框架。信号：利空预测市场板块。",
      "reason": "监管政策直接影响预测市场平台，属于优先级一，影响Polymarket运营及代币价格。",
      "category": "监管政策",
      "impact_coins": ["REP", "POL", "其他预测市场代币"],
      "signal": "bearish",
      "impact_level": 4,
      "sources": [{"name": "The Block", "url": "https://www.theblock.co/post/406400/bipartisan-senators-call-cftc-investigation-polymarket-fake-bets"}],
      "urgency": "hours"
    },
    {
      "title": "DraftKings推出预测市场交易所",
      "summary": "DraftKings宣布推出自己的预测市场交易所，消费者交易量已超过30亿美元。这加剧了预测市场竞争，可能分流Polymarket用户，利空Polymarket代币，但整体利好预测市场赛道。短期看空Polymarket。",
      "reason": "竞争对手入局，直接影响Polymarket市场份额，属于项目更新/竞争动态。",
      "category": "项目更新",
      "impact_coins": ["POL", "REP"],
      "signal": "bearish",
      "impact_level": 3,
      "sources": [{"name": "The Block", "url": "https://www.theblock.co/post/406375/draftkings-launches-own-prediction-markets-exchange-consumer-volume-exceeds-3-billion"}],
      "urgency": "hours"
    },
    {
      "title": "特朗普政府要求OpenAI限制GPT-5.6发布",
      "summary": "据报道，特朗普政府已要求OpenAI限制其GPT-5.6模型的发布范围，理由是对国家安全和虚假信息的担忧。此举可能打压AI板块情绪，导致AI代币（如FET、AGIX、OCEAN等）短期承压，但若限制长期利好监管清晰。信号看空AI板块。",
      "reason": "重大监管干预AI领域，影响AI概念币市场情绪，属于监管政策类。",
      "category": "监管政策",
      "impact_coins": ["FET", "AGIX", "OCEAN", "RNDR"],
      "signal": "bearish",
      "impact_level": 3,
      "sources": [{"name": "Decrypt", "url": "https://decrypt.co/372195/trump-administration-asks-openai-to-limit-gpt-5-6-rollout-reports"}],
      "urgency": "hours"
    },
    {
      "title": "美参议员推动结束CFTC对预测市场州监管攻击",
      "summary": "美国一群参议员提出法案，旨在阻止CFTC对州层面合法预测市场的监管干预，保护各州监管权。这有利于预测市场行业合规发展，利好Polymarket等平台，短期看多预测市场代币。",
      "reason": "监管利好预测市场，与上一条CFTC调查形成对冲，但方向相反。属于监管政策。",
      "category": "监管政策",
      "impact_coins": ["POL", "REP"],
      "signal": "bullish",
      "impact_level": 3,
      "sources": [{"name": "CoinTelegraph", "url": "https://cointelegraph.com/news/us-senators-cftc-assault-state-prediction-markets"}],
      "urgency": "hours"
    },
    {
      "title": "Cathie Wood买入加密货币",
      "summary": "Cathie Wood的ARK Invest近期披露购买了加密货币（具体币种未明确，但可能是BTC或ETH，或相关股票）。作为知名机构投资者，其买入行为提振市场信心，在极度恐惧环境下形成短期利好，看多BTC和ETH。",
      "reason": "机构动向属于优先级二，在市场恐慌时机构买入是积极信号。",
      "category": "ETF机构",
      "impact_coins": ["BTC", "ETH"],
      "signal": "bullish",
      "impact_level": 3,
      "sources": [{"name": "Investor's Business Daily", "url": "https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMisgFBVV95cUxNX0lRT0MwcEdnSllJaWRFbUhVdHhHdXNWSEVjbkdUWnhOVTZnRXA0TG0wWnA0UzRLdUpjUlcwdUdCU1NERkdOMlpoTmJWa0YtUHF6SnF3NHd6VzFVNXFNdkgzTzEyM1dEOU9TZGtROWIzZVRIWXhGaGlmLVVldlZvUEotVU53cnppaDJNVk9wWUxfRkZnUy1DU2FseGFYWlFQVzBpZ2dmQ1AzVnVIck9YZjFn"}],
      "urgency": "hours"
    }
  ]
}
